creator: arundel@FreeBSD.org
text:
please don't set your hdds to a spindown timeout of 1 minute! this WILL damage
your hdds. anything above 15 or better 20 minutes should be ok. keep in mind
that the spindown value is measured in seconds!

sorry i cannot help you with the other issue. have you encountered it again?

cheers.
alex

-- 
a13x
